title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement link
scenario: EULA License Agreement link on onboarding screen navigates to the correct HP software license URL
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. Observe the onboarding flow until the EULA (End User License Agreement) page is displayed.
3. Tap the "License Agreement" link on the EULA page.
expected: The user is directed to the License Agreement page at https://www.hp.com/go/sweula.
